error.signature: Deadlock detected: callback waiting for another callback in same MutuallyExclusiveCallbackGroup

verdict.summary: Calling a service synchronously inside a callback deadlocks the executor. The service response callback cannot run.

dead_ends.action: Use a longer timeout on the synchronous service call
dead_ends.why_fails: The call can never complete because the executor is blocked; timeout just delays the deadlock detection

dead_ends.action: Create a new single-threaded executor per service call
dead_ends.why_fails: Multiple executors on the same node cause undefined behavior with callbacks

workarounds.action: Use async service calls (call_async) inside callbacks
Use MultiThreadedExecutor with ReentrantCallbackGroup for the service client
workarounds.how: cb_group = ReentrantCallbackGroup(); client = self.create_client(srv_type, name, callback_group=cb_group)

workarounds.action: Move the service call to a separate thread
